title: How to How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya: The Complete Creator Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: Selling ebooks from Kenya without PayPal can be a hurdle, especially with the country's restrictive payment landscape. You've tried various platforms, but nothing seems to work. You're not alone. Many creators in Kenya face this challenge due to PayPal's geographic restrictions. You need a solution that bypasses these limitations and helps you connect with international buyers. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, offering a blockchain-based payment system that removes geographic barriers and lets you sell ebooks globally.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Unlike traditional payment processors like PayPal, which have strict guidelines and geographic restrictions, Unchained Commerce's blockchain-based payment system uses NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports 300+ coins and has no KYC requirements. This means you can accept international payments without worrying about KYC compliance or geographic restrictions. Our system is fully automated, so you don't need to manually process transactions or worry about chargebacks.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you set up your ebook store, make sure you have a digital product to sell. This can be an ebook, a course, or any other type of digital product. You'll also need to create a unique URL for your store, which will be used to create a QR code for customers to make payments. You can use Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine to create a custom store with a unique URL.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

GitHub Pages provides free, reliable hosting for static sites with no server management required. A digital store built on GitHub Pages with the Core Shop Engine has no monthly hosting cost, scales automatically to any traffic level, and can be deployed from anywhere in the world. The combination of free hosting, crypto payments through NOWPayments, and automated delivery through the Core Shop Engine creates a store infrastructure with a total cost structure that is fundamentally different from platform-based alternatives. There are no percentage fees on sales, no monthly subscription costs, and no platform that can decide to delist your products based on content policy changes.
You can sell ebooks globally without relying on PayPal or other restricted payment processors.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live. Share your store's QR code with your audience, and start promoting your ebook. When a customer makes a payment, Unchained Commerce's system will automatically deliver the ebook, and you'll receive the payment in your crypto wallet. You can track sales and revenue using our Admin Dashboard.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

The Full Stack Bundle brings together every component needed to build a global digital store: the Core Shop Engine for backend payment verification and automated delivery, Web3 Wallet Connect for the buyer-facing checkout experience, and the Admin Dashboard for transaction tracking and order management. For creators in restricted markets, this is not a luxury — it is the minimum viable infrastructure for a professional digital business. The bundle includes a deployment guide, priority updates, and Discord support. Total cost is a one-time payment of $79.99. There are no monthly fees, no percentage cuts on sales, and no platform relationship that can be terminated by someone else's compliance decision.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
Unchained Commerce's blockchain-based payment system is fully automated, so you don't need to manually process transactions or worry about chargebacks.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a solution to sell ebooks in Nigeria without PayPal, or run a digital product store in Ghana with crypto payments, or even sell digital products in Pakistan without a bank account, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the answer. Our bundle includes everything you need to set up a successful store, including the Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, plus priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide. Visit our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To sell ebooks from Kenya without PayPal, follow these steps: Create a digital product to sell, such as an ebook or course; Create a unique URL for your store using Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine; Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect with your store to accept cryptocurrency payments; Set up your payment and delivery pipeline using Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard; Go live and share your store's QR code with your audience; Track sales and revenue using Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard.
Our Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easy to track sales and revenue.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
